title: Vighnaharta Shree Siddhivinayak
desc: Manav Mehta is a successful industrialist whose personal life is in disarray. His parents leave home because of his uncourteous behavior. After problems at work, his car breaks down on the way to work, and he unintentionally visits the Siddhivinayak temple. This visit changes his life.

title: Hum To Mohabbat Karega
desc: To pursue his love interest, TV reporter Geeta, Raju misleads the police with false clues during a murder investigation. His lies soon land him in trouble with the police and the mafia.

title: Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
desc: Prostitute, Madhu, agrees to be the surrogate mother of Raj and Priya's baby in exchange for a million rupees. Everything soon changes when Madhu develops feelings for both the baby and Raj.

title: Kyo Ki Main Jhuth Nahin Bolta
desc: In this film based on the American comedy "Liar Liar," Raj Malhotra (Govinda) is a lawyer who succeeds professionally by constant lying. His persistent dishonesty infuriates his wife (Sushmita Sen), who threatens to leave him if he doesn't straighten out. Fearful of his parents' divorce, Raj's son wishes that his father could not lie, and creates a sort of curse that prevents Raj from speaking anything but the truth. Raj soon finds that honesty, while sometimes vexing, yields its own rewards.

title: Dost
desc: Two brothers reunite in order to fulfil the wish of their dying father whom Thakur bitterly humiliates and murders. They intend to marry Thakur's two daughters to seek revenge.
